title: Assistant Store Manager - Durian Furniture - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Durian Furniture - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
We at Durian Furniture are looking for an experienced Assistant Store Manager based out of Ludhiana. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Durian Furniture:
Durian Furniture is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Durian Furniture!
